series_metadata.series_description: All quality management records pertaining specifically to CPL's Industrial Hemp section, including obsolete standard operating procedures, vendor evaluations, management reviews, audits and audit findings, proficiency test results, meeting minutes, corrective action reports, improvement action reports, risk reports, complaints, customer surveys, and whatever else might fall under the laboratory's quality management system. The Quality Assurance Officer is the Record Retention Coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep 5 (five) years. ; Electronic: Keep 5 (five) years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
